title: jacksonia uniglandulosa
intro: Jacksonia uniglandulosa, also known as the single-glanded Jacksonia, is a plant species native to Australia that belongs to the Fabaceae family. The medicinal properties of this plant are derived from its leaves and stems, which contain compounds with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Jacksonia uniglandulosa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures that can be used topically or taken orally to leverage its medicinal properties.
